shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The royal unit keeps the bubble family eye language and rounded body language.
differences: The body expands to a 96x96px footprint that covers a 2x2 result state.
Ten frames add crown glint pulses and slow regal breathing.
Royal violet fill and gold crown details make the unit the highest-value visual on the board.

context.usage: Large rare evolution that anchors late-stage balance swings and codex milestones.

specs.texture: Royal violet core with a gold crown and cream highlight beads.
specs.shading: Flat fill with stronger highlight clusters near the crown.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 960x96px with 10 columns and 1 row.
The crown remains readable as a separate gold prop at native scale.
The unit silhouette clearly occupies more visual mass than a single-cell slime.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_slime_units
reference_images.purpose: Grounds slime silhouettes, evolution scale, and facial placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with a large atlas layout and a dedicated rare-unit marker.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_bubble_king_idle_10f_6fps.png during the Loading state and store the handle in a rare-unit art resource.
runtime_notes: Anchor the root transform to the center of the 2x2 occupied footprint.
Advance crown glint frames through the same timer as the body breath loop.
Keep the outer transparent gutter at least 4px wide.
